title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 teaches system security fundamentals including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and best practices to protect data from cyber threats. The lecture is part of Harvard's CS50 curriculum designed for business audiences seeking to understand cybersecurity principles.
